slides.eyebrow: Matimu ya Ntangha wa 5 - Xiyenge xa le Xikarhi
slides.title: Varimi vo Sungula eAfrika-Dzonga
slides.lead: Kwalomu ka malembe ya 1 700 ku ya eka 2 000 lama hundzeke, mindyangu ya varimi yi akile etikweni, yi hlayisa tihomu naswona yi tirha hi nsimbi.

media.alt: Xitsunga xa rihlaza xi ni tindlu to rhendzeleka ta byanyi, homu ni dyambu leri tlhandlukaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='262' cy='44' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 130 Q80 104 160 122 T320 118 V180 H0 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='150' rx='30' ry='16' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M42 150 Q70 118 98 150 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><ellipse cx='140' cy='158' rx='26' ry='14' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 158 Q140 130 164 158 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><g fill='#5c3a24'><ellipse cx='232' cy='150' rx='26' ry='12'/><rect x='210' y='150' width='5' height='16'/><rect x='250' y='150' width='5' height='16'/><path d='M206 142 q-6 -6 2 -10 q6 6 -2 10 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Amukela swichudeni. Hlamusela leswaku, mahlweni ka miti ni madorobha, varimi vo sungula va tile ku ta hanya eAfrika-Dzonga. Eka dyondzo leyi hi ta kuma leswaku a va ri vamani, a va byala yini, ha yini tihomu a ti ri ta nkoka swinene, ni ndlela leyi a va endla switirhisiwa hi nsimbi. Xivutiso xo sungula xo hatlisa: mi ehleketa leswaku purasi a yi languteka ku yini malembe ya 2 000 lama hundzeke?

slides.title: Varimi vo sungula a va ri vavulavuri va Xibantu
slides.lead: Va rhurhele eAfrika-Dzonga exikarhi ka malembe ya kwalomu ka 2 000 na 1 700 lama hundzeke.

blocks.text: Varimi vo sungula a va vulavula **tindzimi ta Xibantu**. Leti i ndyangu wa tindzimi leti isiZulu, isiXhosa, Setswana na Sesotho ti humaka eka tona. Varimi va rhurhele hakatsongo-tsongo va ya edzongeni etikweni leri kutani va ri endla kaya ra vona.

items: A va hanya eka **mavandla** lama rhangeriwaka hi hosi - a hi fanelanga ku ma vitana 'tinyimba' (tribes).
Mavandla ya vona a ma kota ku kula, ku cinca ni ku rhurha hi ku famba ka nkarhi.
A va ri varimi vo tlhariha, vaaki ni vatirhi va nsimbi.

slides.notes: Dyondzisa rito leri nge vavulavuri va Xibantu hi ku olova: ri vula vanhu lava a va vulavula tindzimi leti fambelanaka, vakokwana va tindzimi to tala ta Afrika-Dzonga namuntlha. Yinhla ya nkoka na ya vutwela wa CAPS na SAHO: papalata rito 'tribe' (nyimba). Ri kombisa hi ku hoxeka leswaku vanhu a va nga cinci. Ku ri na sweswo tirhisa 'vandla' kumbe 'vuhosi'. Kandziyisa leswaku a va ri vanhu lava nga ni vutshila na ku tumbuluxa.

slides.title: Ha yini hi wu vitana Nguva ya Nsimbi
slides.lead: I nkarhi lowu vanhu a va endla switirhisiwa ni matlhari ya vona hi nsimbi.

blocks.text: Vativi va matimu va wu vitana **Nguva ya Nsimbi** hikuva vanhu va dyondzile ku endla swilo hi nsimbi. Kambe varimi va endle swo tala ku tlula ntsena ku tirha nsimbi - va byale swilimiwa, va hlayisa swifuwo naswona va aka mimuti. Hikwalaho hi va vitana nakambe **varimi** kumbe **vabyari**.

items: Hi dyondza hi vona eka **vacelacela va matimu (archaeologists)** lava celaka mimuti ya khale.
Va kuma switsotswana swa timbita, switirhisiwa swa nsimbi, vuhlalu ni swikombiso swa tindlu.
Swikombiso leswi swi hi byela ndlela leyi vanhu a va hanya ha yona khale, hambi ku ri handle ka tibuku.

media.alt: Xikwakwarhi xa mucelacela wa matimu xi humesa mbita yo tshoveka ya vumba ehansi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='86' width='220' height='74' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M70 150 q6 -44 40 -44 q34 0 40 44 Z' fill='#8a4a2f'/><path d='M92 118 h36' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M84 132 h52' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='8' height='60' rx='3' fill='#5c3a24' transform='rotate(24 154 70)'/><g fill='#3a3a3a'><rect x='168' y='92' width='16' height='22' rx='2' transform='rotate(24 176 103)'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku 'Nguva ya Nsimbi' i vito ntsena ro pfuna - vanhu a va ri varimi ku sungula. Nghenisa vucelacela bya matimu (archaeology) eka mpimo wa Ntangha wa 5: vativi va sayense va cela hi vukheta va tlhela va dyondzisisa swilo leswi vanhu va swi siyeke. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku hi xihi xikombiso lexi va nga xi lavaka ku kombisa leswaku muti a wu ri kona ensin'wini.

slides.title: Ku aka etikweni
slides.lead: Varimi a va fanele ku tshama endhawini yin'we nkarhi wo leha ku ringana ku byala ni ku tshovela.

blocks.text: Ku endla masimu, varimi a va tsema mirhi ni byanyi byo leha kutani va byi hisa. Nkuma a wu endla misava yi nona leswaku yi byariwa. Leswi swi vuriwa **ku tsema ni ku hisa (slash and burn)**. A va tshama malembe, kambe minkarhi yin'wana a va rhurha loko misava yi **dyiwe hi ku tlula mpimo hi swifuwo (overgrazed)** - loko swifuwo swo tala swi dye byanyi hinkwabyo.

items: A va basisa misava ku byala swilimiwa ni ku aka makaya.
A va aka tindlu ni marhangu ku sirhelela tihomu ta vona.
Loko misava kumbe madyelo swi hela, a va lava misava leyintshwa.

media.alt: Nsimu leyi basisiweke yi ni mifayimu ya swilimiwa swa rihlaza ekusuhi ni mirhi ni ndzilo lowutsongo ni musi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#8a6a3a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='4'><path d='M40 118 v-16'/><path d='M64 118 v-16'/><path d='M88 118 v-16'/><path d='M112 118 v-16'/></g><g fill='#3f6b45'><circle cx='186' cy='70' r='20'/><circle cx='212' cy='80' r='16'/></g><rect x='184' y='84' width='6' height='34' fill='#5c3a24'/><path d='M150 118 q6 -18 16 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M156 100 q4 -12 -2 -20' stroke='#b7a98d' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela ku tsema ni ku hisa hi ndlela yo olova naswona kombisa leswaku varimi, ku hambana ni vahloti-vahlengeleti, a va fanele ku tshama endhawini yin'we ku byala swakudya. Nghenisa 'overgrazed' hi nhlamuselo ya xihlamuselamarito: loko ku ri ni swifuwo swo tala, byanyi a byi na nkarhi wo hluka nakambe. Hlanganisa ni ku khathala hi misava namuntlha - nkarhi wo bula hi vukoka.

slides.title: Ku hlangana ni Khoikhoi ni San
slides.lead: Varimi vo sungula a va fikanga etikweni ro pfumala vanhu - vahloti-vahlengeleti ni varisi a va ri kona ka ha ri khale.

blocks.text: Varimi a va avelana misava ni vahloti-vahlengeleti va **San** ni varisi va **Khoikhoi**. A va pfunana naswona a va **cinca swilo (barter)** - ku cincana swilo handle ka mali. Eminkarhini yo tika ya dyandza, ku avelana loku a ku pfuna un'wana ni un'wana ku ya emahlweni.

items: Varimi va tise switirhisiwa swa nsimbi ni tindlela tintshwa to byala swakudya.
Khoikhoi na San va avelana vutivi bya swimilana ni murhi.
Mipfumawulo ya ku click eka tindzimi ta Xinguni namuntlha yi humile eka tindzimi ta Xikhoisan.

media.alt: Mavoko mambirhi lama cincanaka swilo, rin'wana ri khome xitirhisiwa xa nsimbi rin'wana ri khome ximilana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M30 96 q40 -10 78 6' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='12' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M210 96 q-40 -10 -78 6' stroke='#5c3a24' stroke-width='12' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='104' y='54' width='8' height='40' fill='#3a3a3a'/><path d='M104 54 l-8 -12 h24 l-8 12 Z' fill='#6b6b6b'/><g fill='#3f6b45'><path d='M132 96 q10 -26 0 -44 q-10 18 0 44 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Leyi i mianakanyo ya nkoka ya CAPS: varimi va fikile etikweni laha San na Khoikhoi a va tshamile kona, naswona mavandla a ma tirhisana hakanyingi. Dyondzisa 'barter' eka xihlamuselamarito: ku cincana swilo kumbe mpfuno handle ka mali. Ntiyiso wa mipfumawulo ya click i xikombiso xo saseka, xo tsundzukeka xa ku avelana ka ndhavuko lexi xa ha vumbaka tindzimi namuntlha. Khoma hi xichavo - leyi a ku ri ngopfu ntsheketo wa ku hlanganyela ni ku cincana, ku nga ri ku lwa ntsena.

slides.title: Ku hanya emakaya lama akiweke
slides.lead: Varimi a va aka makaya lama nga heriki naswona a va hanya swin'we eka makaya ya mindyangu.

blocks.text: A ku laveka mavoko yo tala emasin'wini, hikwalaho mindyangu a yi hanya ekusuhi swinene eka **muti (homestead)**. Tindlu ta vona a ti tala ku va to **rhendzeleka**, ti endliwa hi switina swa ndzhope ni misompfa ya byanyi, kumbe tindlu to rhendzeleka to lukiwa hi byanyi. Endzeni ka marhangu a ku ri ni tindlu, mimpfuka ya swakudya ni ndhawu yo sirheleleka ya tihomu.

items: Ntlawa wa makaya a wu kota ku vumba **vuhosi** lebyi rhangeriwaka hi **hosi**.
Hosi a yi languta mabindzu naswona yi avela swilo hi ku ringanana.
Vandla hinkwaro a ri tirha swin'we hi nkarhi wa ku tshovela.

media.alt: Muti wo rhendzeleka wu ni tindlu ta byanyi leti rhendzeleke xivaya xa le xikarhi xa tihomu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 170' role='img'><rect width='220' height='170' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='90' rx='96' ry='72' fill='none' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='92' rx='34' ry='24' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='110' cy='26' r='13'/><circle cx='168' cy='60' r='13'/><circle cx='168' cy='124' r='13'/><circle cx='110' cy='158' r='13'/><circle cx='52' cy='124' r='13'/><circle cx='52' cy='60' r='13'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela muti: tindlu to rhendzeleka ti rhendzela xivaya xa le xikarhi xa tihomu - pulani leyi vacelacela va matimu va ha yi kumaka namuntlha. Nghenisa 'vuhosi' ni 'hosi' eka xihlamuselamarito, u tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku hosi a yi avela swilo naswona yi hlela mabindzu, na leswaku vuhosi a byi kota ku kula, ku hunguteka ni ku cinca. Vutisa leswaku ha yini ku hanya ekusuhi ku pfune mindyangu ya varimi.

slides.eyebrow: Un'wana ni un'wana a a pfuna
slides.title: Ntirho wa vavanuna, vavasati ni vana
slides.lead: Eka vandla ra varimi un'wana ni un'wana a a ri ni ntirho wo endla.

blocks.heading: Vavanuna ni vafana
blocks.text: A va risa ni ku sirhelela tihomu, va hlota swiharhi swa nhova naswona va tirha nsimbi.

blocks.heading: Vavasati ni vanhwanyana
blocks.text: A va khathalela swilimiwa, va kokola masimu, va sweka, va basisa naswona va ka mati.

blocks.heading: Vana
blocks.text: A va nga yi exikolweni - a va dyondza vutshila bya vona hi ku pfuna vanhu lavakulu.

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku mintirho a yi avanyisiwa exikarhi ka vavanuna, vavasati ni vana, na leswaku vana a va tinyungubyisa hi ku pfuna va ha ri vatsongo. Boxa hi ku rhula leswaku loko va va vantshwa lavakulu a va nghena ngoma - nkhuvo wo va amukela evuton'wini bya vanhu lavakulu. Endla leswi hi ku koma ni hi xichavo, hikuva i ndhavuko wa xihundla ni wo kwetsima. Khutaza swichudeni ku pimanisa mintirho leyi ni mintirho ya le mindyangwini namuntlha.

slides.title: Swilimiwa leswi a va swi byala
slides.lead: Varimi vo sungula a va byala mavele naswona a va hlayisa swifuwo swa swakudya.

blocks.text: Swilimiwa swa vona swikulu swimbirhi a ku ri **mabele (sorghum)** ni **nyawuti (millet)**. Mavele lawa a ma silwa ma va vupfa ku endla vuswa kumbe byalwa. A va ri **varimi vo tihanyisa (subsistence farmers)** - a va byala leswi ringaneke mindyangu ya vona ntsena. Loko ntshovelo wu ri kahle swinene, a va cinca leswi seleke ni mavandla man'wana.

items: Mavele a ma hlayisiwa eka swirhundzu kumbe eka migodi leyi celiweke ehansi.
Nakambe a va hlayisa tihuku, tinyimpfu ni timbuti ku kuma matandza, ntswamba ni nyama.
Endzhaku, endzhaku ka va-1500, mavele (maize) ni koroni (wheat) swi engeteriwile emasin'wini ya vona.

media.alt: Mabele yo leha ni nyawuti ekusuhi ni xirhundzu xo luka xa ku hlayisa mavele.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='220' height='32' fill='#8a6a3a'/><g stroke='#7a8b5a' stroke-width='5'><path d='M50 128 v-70'/><path d='M74 128 v-78'/><path d='M98 128 v-66'/></g><g fill='#e8a13a'><ellipse cx='50' cy='52' rx='9' ry='16'/><ellipse cx='74' cy='44' rx='9' ry='16'/><ellipse cx='98' cy='58' rx='9' ry='16'/></g><path d='M140 128 q10 -52 40 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='2'><path d='M150 104 h60'/><path d='M146 116 h68'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Dyondzisa swilimiwa swimbirhi swa nkoka, mabele ni nyawuti, ni rito ra xihlamuselamarito 'murimi wo tihanyisa (subsistence farmer)': munhu la byalaka leswi ringaneke ndyangu wakwe ntsena. Ku hlanganisa loku sasekaka ni vutomi bya siku ni siku: vuswa lebyi vanhu vo tala va Afrika-Dzonga va byi dyaka namuntlha byi huma eka ndhavuko lowu wa khale wa vurimi. Xiya leswaku mavele ni koroni swi tile endzhaku, endzhaku ka ku hlangana ni Vazungu hi va-1500, hikwalaho a swi nga ri xiphemu xa masimu yo sungula.

slides.title: Ha yini tihomu a ti ri ta nkoka swinene
slides.lead: Tihomu a ti ri xikombiso xa vufumi naswona a ti tirhisiwa eka mikhuva ya nkoka swinene.

blocks.text: Tihomu a ti nyika **nyama, ntswamba ni dzovo**, kambe a ti vula swo tala ku tlula swakudya. Ku va ni tihomu to tala a swi kombisa leswaku munhu i **mufumi na wa nkoka**. Tihomu a ti nyikiwa emichatweni ni eku laheni naswona a ti tirhisiwa eka mikhuva yimbirhi yo hlawuleka.

items: **Mafisa**: munhu la fumeke a a lomba tihomu, leswi a swi aka xichavo ni vunghana.
**Lobola** (ndzovolo): tihomu a ti nyikiwa ndyangu wa n'wingi ku xixima vukati.
Lobola ya ha ri nkhuva lowu xiximiwaka eAfrika Dzonga namuntlha.

media.alt: Nkunzi wa matimba wu yime ehenhla ka byanyi, xifaniso xa vufumi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='124' width='240' height='36' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#5c3a24'><ellipse cx='128' cy='86' rx='58' ry='30'/><rect x='84' y='104' width='7' height='26'/><rect x='104' y='106' width='7' height='24'/><rect x='150' y='106' width='7' height='24'/><rect x='168' y='104' width='7' height='26'/><path d='M70 78 q-14 -6 -20 4 q12 6 20 0 Z'/></g><path d='M186 66 q10 -18 22 -6 q-12 4 -14 18 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><path d='M186 66 q-6 -16 -20 -8 q10 6 12 16 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><circle cx='188' cy='78' r='4' fill='#3a3a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku tihomu a ti ri mbilu ya vufumi ni xichavo, ku nga ri swakudya ntsena. Dyondzisa mafisa (ku lomba tihomu ku aka vuxaka lebyinene) ni lobola (ndzovolo lowu nyikiwaka ndyangu wa n'wingi) hi mpimo wo rhula wa Ntangha wa 5. Kandziyisa leswaku lobola i nkhuva lowu ha hanyaka lowu xiximiwaka namuntlha - u hlanganisa matimu ni mindyangu ni mavandla ya swichudeni.

slides.eyebrow: Ku tirha hi ndzilo ni nsimbi
slides.title: Ku endla switirhisiwa hi nsimbi
slides.lead: Varimi vo sungula a va cela nsimbi eka maribye kutani va yi endla switirhisiwa swa nkoka.

blocks.text: **Nsimbi yo rhwaya (iron ore)** yi kumeka eka maribye. Varimi a va yi cela, kutani va yi hisa eka **xitofu xo hisa (furnace)** kukondza yi hundzuka nsimbi yo n'oka. Leswi swi vuriwa **ku n'okisa nsimbi (smelting)**. Vavanuna vo tlhariha a va endla nsimbi yi va **tinhloti ta magenya, makhuva, tihloka ni tinyundzu**, naswona a va endla swikhaviso hi nsimbi ni koporo.

items: Makhuva ni tihloka ta nsimbi swi endle swi olova ku basisa misava ni ku rima.
Nakambe a va endla timbita to saseka ta vumba - ku fana ni **Tinhloko ta Lydenburg (Lydenburg Heads)** leti dumeke.
Tinhloko ta Lydenburg ta nkombo ti endliwile kwalomu ka 500 CE, malembe yo tlula 1 500 lama hundzeke.

media.alt: Xitofu xo rhendzeleka xa vumba xo n'okisa nsimbi xi vangama hi ndzilo, ekusuhi ni khuva ra nsimbi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='240' height='32' fill='#8a6a3a'/><path d='M52 128 q0 -66 46 -66 q46 0 46 66 Z' fill='#a8724a'/><path d='M84 128 q0 -22 14 -22 q14 0 14 22 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M92 116 q6 -14 12 0 Z' fill='#f6d24a'/><rect x='182' y='70' width='6' height='58' fill='#5c3a24'/><path d='M170 70 h30 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#6b6b6b'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela ku n'okisa nsimbi hi ku olova: ku hisa ribye kukondza nsimbi yi n'oka, kutani u yi ba hi nyundzu ku endla switirhisiwa. Xiya leswaku switirhisiwa swa nsimbi swi endle vurimi byi olova - ku tlula ka xiviri ka thekinoloji. Nghenisa Tinhloko ta Lydenburg tanihi xuma xa vutshila bya Nguva ya Nsimbi lexi kumiweke eAfrika Dzonga. Loko nkarhi wu pfumelela, boxa leswaku hi mukhuva, vavasati a va tshamiseriwa ekule ni xitofu, mukhuva wa nkarhi wolowo - swi vule hi ndlela yo ringana tanihi ntiyiso wa matimu.

slides.title: Ku bindzula ekusuhi ni ekule
slides.lead: Varimi vo sungula a va bindzula ku tsemakanya Afrika hambi ku ri ni matiko ya le kule.

blocks.text: Varimi a va bindzula hi ku landza **tinhungu ta mabindzu (trading networks)** - tindlela leti vanhu a va famba ha tona ku cincana swilo. Vabindzuri a va fika eribuweni ra vuxa ra Afrika hi lwandle. Vaafrika a va nyika **nsuku, marhamba ya ndlopfu (ivory) ni nsimbi** kutani va amukela vuhlalu bya nghilazi, tigobyo ni, endzhaku, swakudya swintshwa swo fana ni maakava ni makokonate.

items: A va nga tirhisi ticheleni - vuhlalu, nsimbi, nsuku, nkumba wa koporo ni munyu a swi tirhisiwa tanihi mali.
Vacelacela va matimu va kume tigobyo ta lwandle ni vuhlalu ekule enaz'weni, swi kombisa leswaku mabindzu a ma andzile.
Mabindzu ma pfune miti yin'wana, ku fana ni **Mapungubwe**, ku fuma ni ku va ni matimba.

media.alt: Ntambhu wa vuhlalu bya mabindzu ekusuhi ni ntlawa wutsongo wa nsuku ni rhamba ra ndlopfu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M30 60 q60 40 120 0' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><g><circle cx='40' cy='62' r='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='64' cy='76' r='8' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='90' cy='82' r='8' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='118' cy='78' r='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='142' cy='66' r='8' fill='#2f5233'/></g><path d='M150 128 q30 -30 66 -6 q-30 8 -30 6 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='2'/><g fill='#e8a13a'><circle cx='60' cy='120' r='9'/><circle cx='78' cy='124' r='9'/><circle cx='70' cy='108' r='9'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela tinhungu ta mabindzu tanihi tindlela to famba ku cincana swilo. Kandziyisa leswaku Afrika a yi hlanganisiwile ni misava leyikulu khale hi mabindzu ya Lwandle ra India. Dyondzisa leswaku vuhlalu ni munyu swi tirhile tanihi mali yo sungula. Mapungubwe i xikombiso lexinene xa xiviri xa Ntangha wa 5 xa muti wa mabindzu wo fuma - naswona xi hlanganisa ni dyondzo ya mafumo ya Ntangha wa 6. [SME] Tiyisisa masiku yo sungula lama tshembekaka ya mabindzu ya ribuwo ra Lwandle ra India hi mpimo wa Ntangha wa 5 loko u nga si humesa.

slides.title: Nkarhi-hleleko wa varimi vo sungula

blocks.alt: Nkarhi-hleleko ku suka kwalomu ka malembe ya 2000 lama hundzeke ku ya eka va-1500 lowu kombisaka ku fika ka varimi, ku tirha nsimbi, Tinhloko ta Lydenburg ni Mapungubwe.

events.label: Varimi vo vulavula Xibantu va aka eAfrika-Dzonga
Vazungu va fika; mavele ni koroni swi engeteriwa emasin'wini

slides.notes: Tirhisa nkarhi-hleleko ku pfuna swichudeni ku hlela ntsheketo. Swichudeni swa Ntangha wa 5 swa ha aka ku twisisa ka minkarhi yo leha, hikwalaho pimanisa 'malembe lama hundzeke' ni malembe ya vona kumbe ya kokwana. Xiya leswaku varimi a va ri kona malembe yo tlula gidi mahlweni ka loko Vazungu va fika hi va-1500. [SME] Tiyisisa marito ya siku ro sungula ra Mapungubwe eka ntangha lowu.

slides.title: Leswi hi swi dyondzeke - ni nkarhi wa n'wina
slides.lead: Varimi vo sungula a va byala swilimiwa, va tekela tihomu ta vona ehenhla naswona va endla switirhisiwa swa nsimbi, hinkwaswo va ri karhi va avelana misava ni vanhu vo sungula.

blocks.text: Varimi vo sungula a va ri vanhu vo **vulavula Xibantu** lava akeke etikweni kwalomu ka malembe ya 1 700 ku ya eka 2 000 lama hundzeke. A va byala **mabele ni nyawuti**, va hlayisa **tihomu** tanihi xikombiso xa vufumi, va tirha hi **nsimbi**, naswona va **bindzula** ku tsemakanya Afrika. A va hanya eka **vuhosi** lebyi akiweke naswona va avelana misava ni San na Khoikhoi.

blocks.question: Boxa swilimiwa swimbirhi leswi varimi vo sungula a va swi byala ni xifuwo xin'we lexi a va xi hlayisa.
Hlamusela swivangelo swimbirhi swa ku va tihomu a ti ri ta nkoka swinene eka varimi vo sungula.
Hlamusela ndlela leyi varimi vo sungula a va endla switirhisiwa hi nsimbi.

slides.notes: Hlela hi ku koma miehleketo ya mikulu ya ntlhanu: leswaku varimi a va ri vamani, swilimiwa swa vona, tihomu ta vona, ku tirha ka vona nsimbi ni mabindzu ya vona. Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi ntirho wo tsala kumbe mbulavurisano wa yindlu ya dyondzo; mimpimo ya tinhloko-mbuyelo yi landza xitayela xa CAPS. Tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku dyondzo leyi yi yisa eka Ntangha wa 6, laha va dyondzaka mafumo ya Mapungubwe, Thulamela ni Great Zimbabwe lama humeke eka mavandla lawa ya varimi.
